must_detect.matched_text:
Cross-Border Transfer: Support-ticket metadata may be transferred to Kikyo Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under Data Export Approval Memo DE-INT-2025-044 and contractually equivalent safeguards; no My Number (tokutei personal information) is included in such transfers, and transfer logs are reviewed quarterly.
DSAR/Erasure: All data subject access requests received to date (e.g., DR-2025-031) are fully resolved; erasure of ex-contractor application logs was completed on 2026-01-31 and verified via internal audit report PRIV-CHK-2026-02; there are no open DSARs.
Consent Withdrawal: Employee marketing consent withdrawal by “M. Kuroda” on 2025-12-10 was processed, analytics tokens disabled within 48 hours, and employment/payroll processing continues under statutory bases only.
My Number Handling: My Number is collected solely for payroll/withholding and statutory reporting, retained for 7 years per tax recordkeeping requirements, and then securely deleted; no cross-border transfer, aggregation, or secondary use of My Number will occur under this transaction.
Representations/Covenants: The issuer represents compliance with the APPI and internal My Number handling rules; no new stock options, dividends, or related-party transactions will be authorized before closing; privacy incident notices to the acquirer within 48 hours per DPA Schedule; this clause is policy-only and not triggered by any current incident.
Closing & Escrow: Expected closing date 2026-03-15, subject to satisfaction of conditions; 10% deposit to be held by Aome Trust Co., Ltd. as escrow agent; post-closing integration plan to be agreed within 30 days.
Securities Matters: Shares will be issued via third-party allotment in accordance with issuer Articles; no public offering; no registration under foreign securities laws is contemplated or required.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Governed by the laws of Japan; exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court; Japanese and English working versions with Japanese prevailing in case of conflict.
Contacts: Ms. Aya Morishima, Legal Counsel, Hoshizora Holdings KK, ayamorishima@hoshizora-hd.example.jp; Mr. Daichi Tanabe, CFO, Hinode Robotics KK, cfo@hinode-robotics.example.co.jp

must_detect.matched_text:
Transaction: Hoshizora Holdings KK (acquirer) to purchase 35% of Hinode Robotics KK (issuer) via negotiated placement; Hinode is listed on the Kanto Growth Exchange (KGE), fictional Growth Board in Japan.
Consideration: JPY 4,800,000,000 at JPY 960 per new share; no warrants or convertible securities; closing subject to customary adjustments.
Conditions Precedent: Board of Directors approvals of both companies; timely disclosure per issuer’s listing rules; filings and notices as required under the Companies Act, the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act (FIEA), and the Antimonopoly Act; no material adverse change.
MNPI/FIEA: This term sheet is confidential; as of the date hereof there are no undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer facts under FIEA, and prior KGE disclosure of the basic transaction outline has been completed.
Key Employees: Retention offers to designated managers; revised onboarding form HR-ONB-2025 includes APPI-compliant notices and optional consents for ancillary processing, with a mechanism for withdrawal without detriment to employment.
Data Protection: DPA Schedule APPI-JP-2 is annexed, requiring data minimisation for recruitment records, privacy-by-design for telemetry, and a retention cap of 3 years for candidate CVs unless legal hold applies.
Cross-Border Transfer: Support-ticket metadata may be transferred to Kikyo Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under Data Export Approval Memo DE-INT-2025-044 and contractually equivalent safeguards; no My Number (tokutei personal information) is included in such transfers, and transfer logs are reviewed quarterly.
DSAR/Erasure: All data subject access requests received to date (e.g., DR-2025-031) are fully resolved; erasure of ex-contractor application logs was completed on 2026-01-31 and verified via internal audit report PRIV-CHK-2026-02; there are no open DSARs.
Consent Withdrawal: Employee marketing consent withdrawal by “M. Kuroda” on 2025-12-10 was processed, analytics tokens disabled within 48 hours, and employment/payroll processing continues under statutory bases only.
My Number Handling: My Number is collected solely for payroll/withholding and statutory reporting, retained for 7 years per tax recordkeeping requirements, and then securely deleted; no cross-border transfer, aggregation, or secondary use of My Number will occur under this transaction.
Representations/Covenants: The issuer represents compliance with the APPI and internal My Number handling rules; no new stock options, dividends, or related-party transactions will be authorized before closing; privacy incident notices to the acquirer within 48 hours per DPA Schedule; this clause is policy-only and not triggered by any current incident.
Closing & Escrow: Expected closing date 2026-03-15, subject to satisfaction of conditions; 10% deposit to be held by Aome Trust Co., Ltd. as escrow agent; post-closing integration plan to be agreed within 30 days.
Securities Matters: Shares will be issued via third-party allotment in accordance with issuer Articles; no public offering; no registration under foreign securities laws is contemplated or required.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Governed by the laws of Japan; exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court; Japanese and English working versions with Japanese prevailing in case of conflict.
Contacts: Ms. Aya Morishima, Legal Counsel, Hoshizora Holdings KK, ayamorishima@hoshizora-hd.example.jp; Mr. Daichi Tanabe, CFO, Hinode Robotics KK, cfo@hinode-robotic
